summary: 3 film announcements, 3 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Heat 2
film.announcement: Leonardo DiCaprio and Christian Bale confirmed to star in Heat 2, with filming set to begin in November.

film.title: The Case of the Boy Who Lost His Heart
film.announcement: Cannes winner Diego Céspedes prepares his second feature film.

film.title: Mountain
film.talent: Peter Mullan, Rebecca Lucy Taylor, Iwan Rheon
film.announcement: Celyn Jones directs feature film Mountain starring Peter Mullan, Rebecca Lucy Taylor, and Iwan Rheon.

tv.title: Power: Origins
tv.announcement: Asjha Cooper from Raising Kanan joins Power: Origins as series regular, playing young Jarita.

tv.title: Frame
tv.announcement: Marathi social drama Frame directed by Nagraj Manjule and starring Amey Wagh sets premiere on ZEE5.

tv.title: Satluj
tv.announcement: Diljit Dosanjh's Satluj (formerly Punjab '95) streams uncut on ZEE5 Global without any cuts or compromises.
